title: Almond Bhuna Delight
description: A sweet and juicy Brazilian dish featuring almonds in a bhuna style preparation that is gluten-free-friendly and a crowd pleaser.

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.amount: 1 inch piece, peeled and finely chopped

instructions: Toast the almonds in a pan over medium heat until lightly golden.
In a separate pan, melt the butter and add the ginger, jalapeno pepper, and tomato puree. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes or until the mixture thickens slightly.
Add the toasted almonds to the pan with the spice paste, along with the sugar and lime juice. Mix well and cook for another 2-3 minutes until everything is evenly coated and heated through.
Adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
